title: Manhattan Urban Black Line - 6-Piece Matte Black Soup Plate Set - Premium Stoneware, Dishwasher and Microwave Safe - Stylish Deep Plate Set, Perfect for Pasta and Soup - Pure Living Dinner Set for 6
features: ✅ Modern, Exciting, Urban Cool: Elevate your dining experience with our soup plate set for 6 in stylish matte black. It's more than just dinnerware; it's a lifestyle statement that brings the inspiring City Lifestyle to your table.

✅ Powerful in Vibe & Quality: The Urban Black Line by Pure Living ensures urban flair and premium quality in every piece. Crafted from durable stoneware, this deep plate set is built to last, adding a touch of sophistication to your table setting.

✅ Absolutely Practical for Everyday Use: Designed for convenience, our Manhattan stoneware dinner set is dishwasher and microwave safe, making your daily life easier and leaving more time for the important things.

✅ Ultimate Favorites for Soup, Pasta & More: Just like the vibrant Manhattan district, this plate set is incredibly versatile. Whether for soup, salad, or pasta, these stylish black plates are perfect for any occasion.

✅ Create Your Dream Dinnerware: Mix and match to create your perfect tableware set! Enjoy the selection of matte black dinnerware - individual sets (dinner plates, breakfast plates, soup plates, bowls, cups) and comprehensive combo services.
